objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 08:38 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem856_route_after_bem855.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
if rs in ['route_process_queue_again','route_requeue_claude_response_retry']:
    status='fresh_tick_required_for_claude_response_retry'
    next_action='create fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif rs=='route_process_real_response':
    status='process_real_response_required'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
else:
    status='diagnose_unknown_route_required'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-856 route status'
state={'bem':'BEM-857','status':status,'route_status':rs,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem857_execute_bem856_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem857_execute_bem856_next.md').write_text('# BEM-857 | Execute BEM-856 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. commit_sha null ignored.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-857'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem857_execute_bem856_next.json','governance/reports/bem857_execute_bem856_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-856 next route, selecting a fresh tick for queued Claude response retry or response processing if available')
